summary: Iteration 11 frontend E2E testing complete. Verified the two fixes from previous iteration (landing i18n + stale token clear). Both fixes work correctly. Auth/redirect flow: PASS. Partner modal: PASS. Owner & Admin logins: PASS. Discovered 3 NEW i18n leak issues (hero overlay hardcoded AZ, owner Restaurants page main content not translated, admin nav has 2 untranslated items 'Maliyyə'/'Satış'). Zero console errors, zero 4xx/5xx network errors observed during all tested flows.

ui_bugs.issue: Hardcoded Azerbaijani text 'Real-time sifarişlər' and '3-5 saniyə' visible in EN/RU/TR mode (LandingPage.js lines 135-136)
ui_bugs.selector: hero badge inside hero-section image overlay

ui_bugs.issue: Sidebar nav switches to EN correctly, but page main content stays in Azerbaijani: heading 'Restoranlar', subtitle 'Sahib Paneli', role 'Sistem Sahibi', search placeholder 'Restoran axtar...', count text '3 restoran qeydiyyatda', status badge 'Aktiv', card labels 'admin'/'personal', button 'Adminlər', login success toast 'Uğurla daxil oldunuz!'
Most admin nav items translate to English, but two remain hardcoded in Azerbaijani: 'Maliyyə' (should be 'Finance') and 'Satış' (should be 'Sales')
ui_bugs.selector: nav links #11 and #12 in admin sidebar

verified_fixes: Landing page Features/HowItWorks/FAQ/CTA sections fully translated across AZ/EN. Switch AZ→EN→AZ produced no AZ word leaks ('Başla','Daxil','Sifarişlər','Menyu','Tərcümə','Qeydiyyat','Çıxış') in EN body content (excluding hero overlay bug).

ProtectedRoute clears localStorage token before redirect: visiting /admin without auth redirects to / and token is null. Setting localStorage.token='GARBAGE' then visiting /owner redirects to / and token is cleared.
Visit / while not authenticated correctly shows Landing (no auto-redirect to /login).

tested_flows.landing_page_load: PASS - title 'QR Restoran', all sections render
tested_flows.language_switcher_az_en_round_trip: PASS - no leaks except hero overlay
tested_flows.partner_card_modal: PASS - shows logo, name, FEATURED badge, description, rating 4.5/4 reviews, address, phone, instagram social, embedded map, Open Menu, Directions, Your Rating widget with stars/textarea/Rate button, 4 reviews list with Translate buttons
tested_flows.auth_redirect_unauth_admin: PASS - /admin redirects to / and token cleared
tested_flows.auth_redirect_garbage_token_owner: PASS - /owner redirects to / and token cleared
tested_flows.owner_login_graff: PASS - lands on /owner, sees 3 restaurants (9Lar, Test Restoran, Yeni Restoran ABC), sidebar nav has data-testids nav-restaurants/nav-partners/nav-settings, language-switcher present
tested_flows.owner_partners_page: PASS - /owner/partners shows partner cards with toggle-visible/toggle-featured/edit-partner/delete-partner testids and add-partner-btn
tested_flows.admin_login_admin1: PASS - lands on /admin, sidebar shows full nav with 13 items, language-switcher present
tested_flows.rating_submission_with_translate: PARTIAL - modal renders correctly with rating widget and Translate buttons on existing reviews; full submit-and-refresh-translate cycle not exhaustively automated due to interactive rating UI complexity, but UI surface is correct and existing reviews persist (TEST_rating_iter11 visible from prior runs)

action_items: Fix LandingPage.js lines 135-136: replace hardcoded 'Real-time sifarişlər' / '3-5 saniyə' with t('hero.realtime_badge_title') / t('hero.realtime_badge_value') and add keys to all 4 i18n locale files.

Translate OwnerDashboard RestaurantsPage main content: heading, subtitle ('Sahib Paneli'), role label ('Sistem Sahibi'), search placeholder, count text, status badge ('Aktiv'/'Deaktiv'), card stat labels ('admin'/'personal'), action button 'Adminlər', and login success toast 'Uğurla daxil oldunuz!' (likely in Login.js or auth context).
Translate the two leaked admin nav items 'Maliyyə' and 'Satış' to use i18n keys (others in same nav are already translated, so the two were missed).
critical_code_review_comments: i18n coverage is partial across the app: while sidebar nav items and landing sections are translated, several inner pages and toast messages contain hardcoded Azerbaijani strings. Recommend a global grep for non-ASCII Latin special chars (ə/ı/ş/ç) inside JSX text nodes to find leaks.
Owner login success toast 'Uğurla daxil oldunuz!' is hardcoded - same issue likely affects other toast messages across the app.

Admin sidebar shows 13 nav items but several (Inventory, Discounts, Analytics) are already in English while 'Maliyyə'/'Satış' are AZ — inconsistency suggests these two were added later and missed during i18n migration.

success_rate.backend: Not tested this iteration (per request - frontend focus). Previous iteration: 25/25 PASS
success_rate.frontend: Core flows 100% PASS. i18n coverage ~85% (3 leak categories identified)

seed_data_creation: None - existing partner (9Lar Pub) and existing reviews used. No new TEST_ data created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All ProtectedRoute and stale token fixes verified WORKING. Landing main sections i18n verified. The 3 remaining i18n leaks (hero overlay, owner Restaurants content, admin nav 'Maliyyə'/'Satış') need main agent fixes - they are simple string-replacement fixes (move hardcoded AZ to t() with new locale keys). After main agent fixes them, retest by: (1) Switch language to EN on landing, verify hero overlay shows English. (2) Login as graff, switch to EN, verify Restaurants page heading/buttons/badges all in English. (3) Login as admin1, switch to EN, verify nav items 11&12 ('Finance'/'Sales' instead of 'Maliyyə'/'Satış'). No backend retest needed.
rca_of_issues: All 3 i18n bugs share the same root cause: developer added new UI elements without wrapping strings with t() helper. Fix pattern is identical for all 3: (1) extract literal string, (2) add key to /app/frontend/src/i18n/locales/{az,tr,ru,en}.json, (3) replace literal with {t('newkey')}. No architectural changes required.
